description_long: This is a modern Adidas football with a predominantly white surface, adorned with gold branding and pixelated red, black, and gray graphic panels. The ball features the 'Telstar' branding and a distinctive digital mosaic pattern, reminiscent of official match balls used in major tournaments. The surface appears to be made of synthetic leather with a subtle texture, and the panels are likely thermally bonded, giving it a seamless, high-quality finish. The ball is spherical and of standard size, suitable for professional play, and is likely filled with air to maintain its shape and bounce. The visible logos and text suggest it is an official or replica match ball, designed for use on grass or artificial turf in urban parks or sports fields. The overall appearance is clean and new, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A white Adidas football with gold branding and pixelated red, black, and gray panels, featuring 'Telstar' and a digital mosaic design. The ball is seamless, textured, and appears new.
description_view_0: This view highlights the gold Adidas logo and a large black-and-red pixelated panel, with the 'Telstar' branding clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle shows more of the digital mosaic pattern, with several red and black panels and less visible branding.
description_view_2: The focus here is on the largest red-and-black panel, with the 'Telstar' text partially visible and less emphasis on the Adidas logo.
description_view_3: This view combines the gold Adidas logo and 'Telstar' branding with a prominent red pixelated panel, offering a balanced look at both design elements.
